description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian with a casual urban appearance, featuring a short-sleeved t-shirt and fitted jeans. The figure stands upright with arms slightly outstretched, suggesting a neutral or walking pose. The head is bald, and the facial features are generic, with no visible accessories or carried items. The shoes are low-profile and suitable for everyday walking. The clothing fits closely to the body, with no loose or flowing elements. The overall build is average, and the proportions are realistic for an adult male in a city environment.
description: A casually dressed adult male pedestrian with a bald head, t-shirt, jeans, and low-profile shoes, standing upright in a neutral pose.
description_view_0: Front and partial side views show the face, chest, and arms slightly outstretched, with clear visibility of the t-shirt and jeans.
description_view_1: Side and top-down views highlight the profile of the head, the straight posture, and the alignment of the arms and legs.
description_view_2: Rear and partial side views display the back of the head, shoulders, and legs, with the arms extended outward.
description_view_3: Side and top-down views emphasize the bald head, the straight alignment of the body, and the overall silhouette.
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
